sub_modules.pe: Combinational processing-element datapath: computes one signed 32x32 product and forwards north/west operands to south/east paths.
sub_modules.boundary_router: Combinational boundary input router for the four west A streams and four north B streams.
sub_modules.cycle_control_logic: Combinational next-state logic for the 9-cycle completion counter and done flag.
sub_modules.result_bus_mapper: Combinational mapper from internal C[row][col] accumulator registers to the flat result0-result15 output interface.
